python_environment.bare_python_evidence: python -c "import sys; print(sys.executable)" resolves to C:\Program Files\QGIS 3.40.11\bin\python.exe and fails during init_fs_encoding because encodings is unavailable.

verification_commands.command: py -3.13 -m pytest -q tests/test_large_area_runtime_service.py tests/test_agent_run_service_large_area_runtime.py tests/test_agent_run_service_multisource_building_runtime.py tests/test_tiled_multisource_building_runtime_service.py tests/test_source_semantic_contract_service.py tests/test_source_asset_service.py tests/test_road_conflation_v7.py tests/test_waterways_conflation_v7.py tests/test_fusioncode_poi.py tests/test_run_report_service.py tests/test_track_b_national_scale_service.py tests/test_track_b_national_v7_routes.py

verification_commands.summary: Full repository suite emitted an early failure marker and continued without a final summary for several minutes; the run was stopped and followed by --maxfail=1 reproduction.

verification_commands.failure_note: The legacy enhancement test stubs resolved water shapefile paths with dummy text files. The current shared large-area runtime reads real vector files and fails with pyogrio DataSourceError before the old mocked executor path can succeed. The Task 8 target suite remains passing.

optional_live_source_smoke.command: py -3.13 scripts/materialize_source_assets.py --source raw.osm.building --source raw.microsoft.building --source raw.osm.road --source raw.overture.transportation --source raw.osm.water --source raw.hydrolakes.water --source raw.osm.waterways --source raw.hydrorivers.water --source raw.osm.poi --source raw.gns.poi --bbox 36.65,-1.45,37.10,-1.10 --prefer-remote
optional_live_source_smoke.reason: provider_dependent_remote_download_smoke; fixture-level shared runtime closure must not block on remote OSM, Microsoft, Overture, HydroLAKES, HydroRIVERS, or GNS provider availability.

notes: Use py -3.13 -m pytest for verification on this host.
